
# Shooting Projects

## ELR Custom build
1. Zeus Terminus QC action for a multi-caliber build

##  Smokeless Muzzleloader
1. Concept: A 750yd, .50-cal tack driver that is legal to hunt extended seasons with and capable of any big game, but cheap to shoot and fun  
1. Rem700-style custom action: 
    1. [Mack bros EVO II](https://macbros.com/product/evo-ii-muzzleloader-action/)
    1. [Defiance Outcast](https://defiancemachine.com/actions/outcast/)
    1. Savage 110
1. [Arrowhead Breech plug](https://www.rokslide.com/arrowhead-breech-plug-for-remington-muzzleloader-review/)
1. High-twist for [monolithic copper(https://cuttingedgebullets.com/products/44cal-210gr-mzl-maximus-12ct) 
1. Barrel from [Hart](https://hartbarrels.com/) with the breech plug work (right here in LaFayette!)
1. Muzzle brake it, because why not, you can have any features you want on a muzzleloader!
1. Make a custom laminate stock: mostly, for fun
    1. Build up from laser cut wood veneer, laminate with epoxy and CNC mill
    1. Floated barrel and bedded action
    1. Built-in weight adjustment
1. [Examples](https://www.blueprintedfirearms.com/smokeless-muzzleloaders)

## Specialized Ammo
1. [Lead-free](https://cuttingedgebullets.com/products/308-180gr-mth-match-tactical-hunting)
1. [Force-on-force training](https://utmworldwide.com/products-2/man-marker-round-mmr)
1. [Cast](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZGxD1p0nkTo), [powder-coated](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XpvM1CxRWfQ), [slick-sided](https://accuratemolds.com/bullet_detail.php?bullet=31-196TG), [gas-checked](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MmJVx2bNOxw) subsonics

##  Handmade Recurve Bow 
1. Specs
    1. takedown
    1. PVC or laminated wood
1. References
1. [Nick Tomihama's builds](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGRzZMpVk2Hr66k2BwTQjO2IBW9D4ptDA)
    1. Books
        1. The Traditional Bowyer's Bible, Volume 2
        1. Traditional Bowyers of America
        
##  [Ballistic](https://www.tektoknives.com/blogs/news/the-most-illegal-knife-in-the-united-states) Sgian Dubh: Spetznatz meets Highlander
1. A 6" drop point ka-bar blade style, with a short section of the back sharpened to make the tip double-sided
1. Paired set with armpit sheaths
1. [Pre-cut](https://newjerseysteelbaron.com) and ground from O1 steel blank
1. Reciever and tang turned on a metal lathe
1. Black/blued blade and handle finish
1. Removable 50# compression coil spring
1. Hole in tang for kunai mode
